product_overview: Career Studio AI is a local-first career management app that lets users import, edit, analyze, and export resume profiles on their own machine. It also supports AI-assisted resume analysis, cover letter generation, job matching, and activity tracking using user-provided API keys.
core_goals: Import a resume or create a profile and manage career data locally
Edit profile details across skills, experience, projects, education, certifications, and summary
Use AI tools to analyze a resume and generate tailored cover letters
Search for matching jobs based on profile skills and filter results by portal
Configure local AI settings and manage saved activity history
Export a profile in multiple document and web formats

features.name: Authentication and Guest Access
features.description: Users can sign in, create an account, recover access, or continue without an account to reach the workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Choose to sign in -> Enter credentials -> Submit the form -> See the upload screen with an authenticated session
Navigate to / -> Choose to create an account -> Enter username and password -> Submit the form -> See the upload screen with a new authenticated session
Navigate to / -> Choose to recover a password -> Enter a username -> Submit the request -> See a password reset success message
Navigate to / -> Choose to continue as a guest -> Reach the upload screen without signing in
Navigate to / -> Choose to sign in -> Enter an incorrect password -> Submit the form -> See an inline login error message

features.name: Resume Import and Saved Profile Management
features.description: Users can add a resume from a supported file type, open previously saved profiles, and remove profiles they no longer need.
user_flows: Navigate to / after authentication -> Upload a supported resume file -> See the file parsed and the profile editor opened for the new profile
Navigate to / after authentication -> Drag and drop a supported resume file -> See the file parsed and the profile editor opened for the new profile
Navigate to / after authentication -> Open the saved profile list -> Choose a saved profile to open -> See that profile load in the editor
Navigate to / after authentication -> Open the saved profile list -> Remove a saved profile after confirming the prompt -> See the profile disappear from the list
Navigate to / after authentication -> Sign out -> Return to the login screen and end the session

features.name: Profile Editor: Contact and Summary
features.description: Users can update top-level profile information and their professional summary in the editor.
user_flows: Open the profile editor -> Edit the full name -> Save the change -> See the updated value persist after reload
Open the profile editor -> Edit the professional summary -> Save the change -> See the summary update in the profile

features.name: Profile Editor: Skills Management
features.description: Users can add and delete skills with supporting details in the skills tab.
user_flows: Open the profile editor -> Switch to the skills section -> Add a new skill with its name and category -> See the skill appear in the list
Open the profile editor -> Switch to the skills section -> Remove a skill -> See the skill disappear from the list

features.name: Profile Editor: Experience Management
features.description: Users can add and delete work experience entries with role and date details.
user_flows: Open the profile editor -> Switch to the experience section -> Add a new work experience entry -> See the entry appear in the list
Open the profile editor -> Switch to the experience section -> Remove a work experience entry -> See the entry disappear from the list

features.name: Profile Editor: Projects, Education, and Certifications
features.description: Users can add portfolio projects, education history, and certifications to the profile.
user_flows: Open the profile editor -> Switch to the projects section -> Add a project with a name and description -> See the project appear in the list
Open the profile editor -> Switch to the education section -> Add an education entry -> See the education entry appear in the list
Open the profile editor -> Switch to the certifications section -> Add a certification -> See the certification appear in the list

features.name: AI Resume Analysis
features.description: Users can run an AI-based resume analysis to get a score, strengths, weaknesses, suggestions, and ATS keywords.
user_flows: Open the profile editor -> Switch to the analysis section -> Start resume analysis -> See a loading state followed by the analysis score and recommendations
Open the profile editor -> Switch to the analysis section without configuring AI access -> Attempt to analyze the resume -> See an error message explaining AI is not configured

features.name: AI Cover Letter Generation
features.description: Users can generate tailored cover letters and review previously generated letters.
user_flows: Open the profile editor -> Switch to the cover letter section -> Enter a job title and company -> Generate a cover letter -> See the generated cover letter and saved history entry
Open the profile editor -> Switch to the cover letter section -> View previously generated cover letters -> See the saved letters listed by job title and company

features.name: Job Search and Filtering
features.description: Users can search for matching jobs, narrow results by portal, and open job listings in a new tab.
user_flows: Open the profile editor -> Switch to the jobs section -> Search for jobs -> See results with title, company, location, source badge, and match score
Open the profile editor -> Switch to the jobs section -> Select a portal filter -> See the results narrow to that portal
Open the profile editor -> Switch to the jobs section -> Choose a job result -> See the job open in a new browser tab

features.name: AI Settings Management
features.description: Users can configure their AI provider, model, and API key, including switching to local Ollama settings.
user_flows: Open the profile editor -> Switch to the settings section -> Enter an OpenAI API key -> Save the setting -> See a success message
Open the profile editor -> Switch to the settings section -> Switch to Ollama mode -> See the Ollama URL and model fields appear

features.name: Activity Logs
features.description: Users can review recent actions such as imports, exports, AI calls, and deletions in a read-only log view.
user_flows: Open the profile editor -> Switch to the logs section -> View the recent activity list -> See action type, detail, and timestamp for each entry

features.name: Profile Export
features.description: Users can export the current profile into multiple file formats such as JSON, CSV, XML, DOCX, PDF, LaTeX, HTML, and portfolio formats.
user_flows: Open the export panel -> Choose a file format such as JSON -> See a file download start in the browser
Open the export panel -> Choose PDF export -> See a PDF download start in the browser

features.name: Login & Registration Screen
features.description: Full auth UI — Sign In, Create Account, Forgot Password, Reset Password flows. Guest (no-account) access also supported.

pages.description: Login screen shown on first visit or after logout. Contains Sign In / Create Account tabs, Forgot Password link, and Continue as Guest button.

interactions.action: Click "Sign In" tab and submit valid credentials
interactions.expected: Redirected to Upload screen; JWT stored in localStorage

interactions.action: Click "Create Account" tab and submit valid username/password
interactions.expected: Account created, JWT stored, redirected to Upload screen
Error message displayed inline

interactions.action: Click "Forgot Password?" and submit a username
interactions.expected: Success message shown with dev reset URL link
Redirected to Upload screen without auth

features.name: Upload / Home Screen
features.description: Landing page after auth. Allows resume file upload via drag-and-drop or file picker. Shows saved profiles list. Features overview grid.

pages.description: Upload drop zone supporting .json/.csv/.xml/.docx/.doc/.pdf/.tex files. Header with nav, feature grid, footer.

interactions.action: Click upload drop zone and select a supported file
interactions.expected: File parsed, redirected to Profile Editor with the new profile

interactions.action: Drag and drop a resume file onto the drop zone
interactions.expected: File parsed, redirected to Profile Editor
List of user's saved profiles appears
Profile Editor opens for that profile

interactions.action: Click 🗑 delete button on a saved profile
interactions.expected: Confirmation prompt appears; profile removed from list on confirm
Redirected to Login screen; localStorage cleared

features.name: Profile Editor — Contact & Summary Tabs
features.description: Edit top-level profile fields (name, email, phone, location, links) and professional summary.

pages.description: Tabbed profile editor. Contact tab is the default tab.

interactions.action: Edit full name field and save
interactions.expected: Profile patched successfully; updated value persists on reload
Summary updated via PATCH /api/profiles/{id}

features.name: Profile Editor — Skills Tab
features.description: View, add, and delete skills with name, category, and years of experience.

interactions.action: Add a new skill with name and category
interactions.expected: Skill appears in list; persisted to backend
Skill removed from list

features.name: Profile Editor — Experience Tab
features.description: View, add, and delete work experience entries with company, role, dates, and bullet points.

interactions.expected: Entry appears in list with company, role, and date fields
Entry removed from list

features.name: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, Certifications Tabs
features.description: CRUD for project portfolio, education history, and professional certifications.

interactions.action: Add a project with name and description
interactions.expected: Project appears in list
Education appears in list
Certification appears in list

features.name: Profile Editor — Analysis Tab
features.description: AI resume scoring panel showing score (0-100), strengths, weaknesses, suggestions, and ATS keywords.

interactions.expected: Loading state shown; AI analysis result displayed with score, strengths, weaknesses, suggestions, ATS keywords

interactions.action: View analysis without AI key configured
interactions.expected: Error message shown explaining AI is not configured

features.name: Profile Editor — Cover Letter Tab
features.description: Generate tailored AI cover letters by entering job title, company, and optional notes.

interactions.action: Enter job title and company, click Generate
interactions.expected: Cover letter text displayed; saved to history

interactions.action: View list of previously generated cover letters
interactions.expected: Saved letters listed with job title and company

features.name: Profile Editor — Jobs Tab
features.description: Search for matching jobs across multiple portals using profile skills. Shows match score per result.

interactions.expected: Job results appear with title, company, location, source badge, and match score

interactions.action: Select a specific portal filter (e.g., remoteok)
interactions.expected: Results filtered to that portal only
Opens the job URL in a new tab

features.name: Profile Editor — Settings Tab
features.description: Configure AI provider (OpenAI / Anthropic / Ollama) and API keys. Keys are stored encrypted.

interactions.action: Enter an OpenAI API key and save
interactions.expected: Key saved; success message shown
Ollama URL and model fields appear

features.name: Export Panel
features.description: Export the profile in multiple formats (JSON, CSV, XML, DOCX, PDF, LaTeX, HTML, portfolio).

interactions.expected: File download triggered in the browser
PDF file downloaded

features.name: Activity Logs Tab
features.description: View a read-only list of recent actions (imports, exports, AI calls, deletions).

interactions.expected: List of recent activity entries shown with action type, detail, and timestamp

features.name: Toast Notifications
features.description: Global toast notification system for success/error feedback across all actions.

interactions.expected: Toast notification appears briefly and auto-dismisses

known_limitations.issue: Export button triggers a backend endpoint that has a known TypeError bug (_check_ownership called with wrong arity)
known_limitations.impact: All export format downloads will fail with a 500 error until the backend bug is fixed

known_limitations.issue: AI tabs (Analysis, Cover Letter, Roadmap) silently fail if no API key is configured in Settings
known_limitations.impact: Users may not understand why AI features return errors without a clear setup guide
